'''âzh-b-k''' ('''kazhabak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preaccept|preaccept]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preaccept|preaccept]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-b-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhabak|thizhabak]] || [[word:jizhabak|jizhabak]] || [[word:shizhabak|shizhabak]] || [[word:kizhabak|kizhabak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhabak|thuthuzhabak]] || [[word:jujuzhabak|jujuzhabak]] || [[word:shushuzhabak|shushuzhabak]] || [[word:kukuzhabak|kukuzhabak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhabak|thuzhabak]] || [[word:juzhabak|juzhabak]] || [[word:shuzhabak|shuzhabak]] || [[word:kuzhabak|kuzhabak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhabak|thuzhabak]] || [[word:juzhabak|juzhabak]] || [[word:shuzhabak|shuzhabak]] || [[word:kuzhabak|kuzhabak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhabak|thezhabak]] || [[word:jezhabak|jezhabak]] || [[word:shezhabak|shezhabak]] || [[word:kezhabak|kezhabak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhabak|thothozhabak]] || [[word:jojozhabak|jojozhabak]] || [[word:shoshozhabak|shoshozhabak]] || [[word:kokozhabak|kokozhabak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhabak|thozhabak]] || [[word:jozhabak|jozhabak]] || [[word:shozhabak|shozhabak]] || [[word:kozhabak|kozhabak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhabak|thozhabak]] || [[word:jozhabak|jozhabak]] || [[word:shozhabak|shozhabak]] || [[word:kozhabak|kozhabak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhabak|thĂŠzhabak]] || [[word:jĂŠzhabak|jĂŠzhabak]] || [[word:shĂŠzhabak|shĂŠzhabak]] || [[word:kĂŠzhabak|kĂŠzhabak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhabak|thathazhabak]] || [[word:jajazhabak|jajazhabak]] || [[word:shashazhabak|shashazhabak]] || [[word:kakazhabak|kakazhabak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhabak|thazhabak]] || [[word:jazhabak|jazhabak]] || [[word:shazhabak|shazhabak]] || [[word:kazhabak|kazhabak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhabak|thazhabak]] || [[word:jazhabak|jazhabak]] || [[word:shazhabak|shazhabak]] || [[word:kazhabak|kazhabak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhabak|shazhabak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhabak|goshazhabak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhabak|gokishazhabak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhabaknĂŒ|shazhabaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhabaknknĂŒ|goshazhabaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhabaknĂŒ|gokishazhabaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhabakshĂ«|shazhabakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkshĂ«|goshazhabaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhabakshĂ«|gokishazhabakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhabakro|shazhabakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkro|goshazhabaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhabakro|gokishazhabakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhabakmu|shazhabakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkmu|goshazhabaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhabakmu|gokishazhabakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhabaksher|shazhabaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhabaknksher|goshazhabaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhabaksher|gokishazhabaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhabakng|shazhabakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkng|goshazhabaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhabakng|gokishazhabakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhabakya|shazhabakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkya|goshazhabaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhabakya|gokishazhabakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhabakyam|shazhabakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkyam|goshazhabaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhabakyam|gokishazhabakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhabaknĂŒshĂ«|shazhabaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhabaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhabaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhabaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhabaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhabaknĂŒro|shazhabaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhabaknknĂŒro|goshazhabaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhabaknĂŒro|gokishazhabaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhabaknĂŒmu|shazhabaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhabaknknĂŒmu|goshazhabaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhabaknĂŒmu|gokishazhabaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhabakshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhabakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhabaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhabakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhabakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhabakshĂ«ro|shazhabakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkshĂ«ro|goshazhabaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhabakshĂ«ro|gokishazhabakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhabakshĂ«mu|shazhabakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkshĂ«mu|goshazhabaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhabakshĂ«mu|gokishazhabakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhabakronĂŒ|shazhabakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkronĂŒ|goshazhabaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhabakronĂŒ|gokishazhabakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhabakroshĂ«|shazhabakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkroshĂ«|goshazhabaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhabakroshĂ«|gokishazhabakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhabakromu|shazhabakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkromu|goshazhabaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhabakromu|gokishazhabakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhabakmunĂŒ|shazhabakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkmunĂŒ|goshazhabaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhabakmunĂŒ|gokishazhabakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhabakmushĂ«|shazhabakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkmushĂ«|goshazhabaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhabakmushĂ«|gokishazhabakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhabakmuro|shazhabakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhabaknkmuro|goshazhabaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhabakmuro|gokishazhabakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
